page.orgKpiDescription: Review KPI overview, assign targets, and track organization-wide performance.
page.myKpiDescription: Targets currently applied to you based on your active role and project assignments.
page.periodicReportsDescription: Dispatch periodic reports manually, inspect retries, and download generated CSV artifacts.
page.periodicReportsDescriptionNoPermission: Review periodic report history and manual dispatch activity.
page.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to access this page.

achievement.achievementUnavailable: Achievement data is not available yet.
achievement.targetAchievedDescription: All tracked metrics have reached the current target.
achievement.targetExceededDescription: {value} above target based on tracked metrics.
achievement.targetNotMetDescription: {value} remaining to reach the current target.

detail.currentTargetDescriptionSelf: These are the targets currently being used to evaluate your project KPI.
detail.currentTargetDescriptionMember: These are the targets currently being used to evaluate this member's project KPI.

myKpi.failedToLoad: Failed to load your KPI targets.
myKpi.emptyDescription: Active targets assigned to you will appear here based on your current role and project assignments.

header.title: Analytics & Insights
header.description: Monitor AI performance, query patterns, and knowledge gaps.

dailyReports.pageDescription: Review project worklogs, refine the narrative, and submit your daily report.
dailyReports.scopeDescription: Daily reports are now scoped by project, member, and date.
dailyReports.narrativeDescription: Refresh draft items from project worklogs, then edit the narrative before submitting.
dailyReports.noProjectsDescription: Join a project first to generate a project-scoped daily report.
dailyReports.selectProjectDescription: Pick the project you want to report for before loading the draft.
dailyReports.lockedTitle: This report is no longer editable.
dailyReports.lockedDescription: Reports can only be edited while they are in draft status.
dailyReports.itemsDescription: Items are generated from worklogs in the selected project for that date.
dailyReports.empty: No report is available for the selected project and day.

toasts.refreshFailed: Failed to regenerate daily report draft.

items.empty: No daily report items are available for this day.
items.noSummary: No summary captured for this item.

teamDailyReports.pageDescription: Review draft and submitted daily reports within a selected project.
teamDailyReports.noPermissionDescription: Track draft and submitted daily reports across a project.
teamDailyReports.filtersDescription: Pick a project first, then narrow the results by date and member.
teamDailyReports.noProjectsDescription: Team daily reports only exist inside projects that you can access.
teamDailyReports.selectProjectDescription: Project daily reports are scoped by project, member, and date.
teamDailyReports.submittedDescription: Reports that are already visible to managers in this project.
teamDailyReports.noSubmitted: No submitted reports for the selected filters.
teamDailyReports.draftDescription: Reports that still need attention before the day closes.
teamDailyReports.noDraft: No draft reports for the selected filters.

filters.periodKeyPlaceholder: Filter by period key (YYYY-MNN, YYYY-QN, YYYY-Y)
filters.periodKeyHint: Enter a full period key like {monthly}, {quarterly}, or {yearly} to apply this filter.

history.title: Periodic report history
history.empty: No periodic report runs match the current filters.

detail.title: Periodic report run details
detail.description: Review attempts, artifact downloads, and resend options for the selected run.
detail.selectRun: Select a periodic report run to inspect its details.
detail.resendDescription: Use safe resend to reuse the previous build, or rebuild artifacts before sending again.
detail.artifactsDescription: Download generated CSV artifacts for this run.
detail.noArtifacts: No artifacts were attached to this run.
detail.attemptsDescription: Retry attempts and manual dispatch history for this run.
detail.noAttempts: No attempt records available for this run.

dispatchDialog.title: Send periodic report now
dispatchDialog.description: Manually dispatch a monthly, quarterly, or yearly report for a specific closed period.
dispatchDialog.forceResendDescription: Send again even if the selected report period has already been sent.
dispatchDialog.forceRebuildDescription: Rebuild snapshots and CSV artifacts before dispatching.
dispatchDialog.monthlyValidation: Period key must follow the YYYY-MNN format.
dispatchDialog.yearlyValidation: Period key must follow the YYYY-Y format.
dispatchDialog.quarterlyValidation: Period key must follow the YYYY-QN format.

dispatchError.running: A periodic report for this period is already running. Please wait for the current run to finish.
dispatchError.alreadySent: This periodic report was already sent. Enable Force resend to send it again.

kpiTargets.deleteDescription: This will soft delete the target. It will no longer appear in list/detail.
kpiTargets.title: KPI Targets
kpiTargets.description: Assign targets by user, organization role, or project role.

kpiTargetForm.description: Create targets for users, organization roles, or project roles.
kpiTargetForm.noProjectMembers: No project members found for this project.
kpiTargetForm.selectProjectToLoadRoles: Select a project to load project roles.
kpiTargetForm.periodHint: Period end is calculated from the selected start date: +1 month, +3 months, or +1 year minus one day.
kpiTargetForm.requireZeroOverdueDescription: Use this when overdue tasks should make the target stricter.
kpiTargetForm.targetConfigError: Add at least one target metric or overdue rule.

kpiTargetClone.title: Clone KPI Targets
kpiTargetClone.description: Copy targets from one period start date to another. Role-scoped targets are not filtered by selected users.
kpiTargetClone.userFilterHint: Optional. This only filters source rows where scope is USER.

validation.periodStartValid: Period start must be a valid date.
validation.periodEndValid: Period end must be a valid date.
validation.periodEndAfterStart: Period end must be after period start.
validation.periodEndExpected: For {label} targets starting {start}, period end must be {end}.
validation.selectAtLeastOneOrgRole: Select at least one organization role.
validation.projectRequiredForProjectRole: Project is required for project role targets.
validation.selectAtLeastOneProjectRole: Select at least one project role.
validation.noteMax: Note must be 1000 characters or fewer.
validation.targetPeriodDifferent: Target period must be different from source period.
